narrative:
Delaware City has 30,255 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.8 percentage points.
